sections.title: Car Rental
sections.subtitle: A conversation about renting a car for a weekend trip

questions.question: Customer name: _______
questions.explanation: The customer gives his name as Tom Baker.|顾客说他叫Tom Baker。

questions.question: Car model requested: _______
questions.explanation: He requests an SUV model.|他要求一辆SUV车型。

questions.question: Rental period: _______ days
questions.explanation: He needs the car for three days.|他需要车三天。

questions.question: Pick-up date: _______ Friday
questions.explanation: Pick-up is next Friday.|取车是下周五。

questions.question: What insurance option does he choose?
questions.explanation: He selects the standard insurance option.|他选择标准保险选项。

questions.question: Daily rate: £_______
questions.explanation: The daily rate is 45 pounds.|每日费用是45英镑。

questions.question: Total deposit: £_______
questions.explanation: The deposit is 150 pounds.|押金是150英镑。

questions.question: What additional item does he request?
questions.explanation: He requests a GPS navigation system.|他要求一个GPS导航系统。

questions.question: Driver's license number: _______
questions.explanation: His license number is BAKER78901.|他的驾照号码是BAKER78901。

questions.question: Return time: _______ PM
questions.explanation: The car must be returned by 6:00 PM.|必须在下午6点前还车。
